content: Official Vite docs state import.meta.env.BASE_URL is determined by the base config option and must be used exactly as import.meta.env.BASE_URL for dynamic URL concatenation; Vite rewrites JS/CSS/HTML asset URLs for configured base paths. For StockCentral on GitHub Pages under /CentraldeFilamentos/, reuse dataUrl/fetchJson patterns and avoid hardcoded /data or absolute GitHub Pages URLs.
